description: Ensurge Micropower ASA provides energy storage solutions for wearable devices, connected sensors, and other applications in the United States, Europe, and Asia. The company offers solid-state lithium battery technology that enables it to produce rechargeable micro batteries. Its products are used in hearables, medical wearables, sports and fitness wearables, and home and industrial connected devices. The company was formerly known as Thin Film Electronics ASA and changed its name to Ensurge Micropower ASA in June 2021. Ensurge Micropower ASA was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
